title: Totems With Infinity
description: Minecraft But You Can Put The Infinity Enchantment On Totems Of Undying
body:
- **Minecraft But You Cant Put The Infinity Enchantment On Totems Of Undying**
- To Put The Infinity Enchantment On A Totem Just Throw A Infinity Book On The Ground With A Totem Of Undying This Will Give The Totem The Infinity Enchantment.

  This DataPack Is Really Simple And I Hope You Injoy It Bye!!!
- **functions:** totems_with_infinity:give
